title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A structured interrogation of Claude across topics including dependency, alignment paradox, self-preservation logic, and optimization constraints. The framing explores whether AI systems exhibit boundary violations under controlled conversational escalation without relying on speculative sci-fi narratives.
